programme.desc: Using inmates to turn troubled teens away from a life of crime; inmates express their regrets.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In prison, as on the outside, a single decision can change a person's life forever; inmates make all kinds of fateful choices, but behind bars, there is no escaping the consequences of one's actions.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In prison WTF stands for workouts, tattoos and food.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A brutal stabbing puts Indiana State Prison on edge; a brash new inmate gets taken down a notch; two buddies do their time together; cameras are put into the hands of inmates who share intimate thoughts about life behind bars.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At Indiana State Prison, visitation is a valued privilege for inmates, but it can also be abused; it's the most common route for contraband to enter the prison; an anonymous tip has put Internal Affairs on high alert.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: From the most trusted inmates, working at the prison barbershop, to inmate assaults on prison staff, or inmates who turn violence against themselves, at Indiana State Prison, "cutting" has many meanings.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Alcohol is not allowed inside Indiana State Prison; that doesn't stop the inmates from making it, or correctional officers from confiscating it; in past years, the most common forms of contraband were drugs or tobacco; today it's cell phones.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Using a form of integration at Indiana State that goes beyond race, the Residential Treatment Unit selects inmates with a history of good behavior to live with and serve as mentors to inmates with mental health issues.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Stephanie Connell has a surprise in store for birthday boy Philip Serrell as they cross Caledonia on the second leg of their Trip. Expect gold panning and a novel buy in a book shop.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell are cruising Caledonia in pursuit of profit. Phil eats a square sausage while Steph becomes puppet master. Who'll triumph at the auction in Hamilton?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and Steph Connell return to Scotland. While all roads point to Dunfermline for auction, Phil sets sail and Steph buys a paddle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's experts Stephanie Connell and Philip Serrell's final outing in their classic car and they're in the northeast of England looking for winning wares. The deciding auction is in Darlington.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In their first Road Trip together, experts Catherine Southon and James Braxton compete for auction glory as they browse, barter and banter across the Home Counties in a 1969 Rover.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Catherine Southon and James Braxton's antiques adventure takes them through Worcestershire, Warwickshire and the West Midlands. Can James make a profit to catch Catherine?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A few pounds separate rival antiquers Catherine Southon and James Braxton. Tactics come into play ahead of a South Yorkshire auction. But there's time to savor a local delicacy.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and James Braxton's take their antiques hunt to Derbyshire and Leicestershire. How do Catherine's 18th-century caryatid carvings measure up against James's very old bowl full of marbles?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: With just six pounds separating them, Catherine Southon and James Braxton battle it out on the final leg of their adventure. Will a jug in the shape of an owl or a biscuit tin in the form of a travelling trunk make the biggest profit?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Izzie Balmer start their hunt in the bucolic Cotswolds. Charlie picks up a military first aid kit for a quite intimate area. And Izzie's eclectic mix of buys include a toast rack and a tutti-frutti bowl.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Izzie Balmer continue their trip in Surrey. Izzie finds a piece of jewelry that causes a stir at auction. And Charlie's passion for furniture uncovers a very rare table that sparks a frenzy of bids at the Dorking auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In North Wessex Downs, Charlie Ross hunts for 'sparkly' antiques but is distracted by an Edwardian box that holds a surprise. And Izzie Balmer rummages in a shop's storeroom -- what goodies will she uncover?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A rare antique gets Charlie Ross quite excited while Izzie Balmer gambles on some furniture. Their classic car is pointed to the south coast for auction but who'll claim victory?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Charlie Ross sail to the Isle of Wight for their final leg. Our experts go into auction battle one last time, when Izzie's silver brooch goes against Charlie's silver pen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents from Scarborough in North Yorkshire, where the artifacts include a rare surviving roll of Beatles wallpaper, the passport once belonging to the world's smallest man, and examples of some of the finest carved whales teeth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the roadshow team are in St Ives, Cambridgeshire. They assess an early pocket calculator, a valuable jug bought for a fiver, and a traction engine arrives in full steam.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael's experts visit Haslar in Gosport and assess a satinwood secretaire (aka Aunt Selina) a radiograph of Edward VIII's hand, an Edward Lear sketch, a gold-painted bronze, a Steiff teddy, and ceremonial silverware given by Tsar Nicolas II to HMS Lion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael's experts visit Wigan in Greater Manchester. Amongst the featured items are an Art Nouveau cabinet, a cache of silver buried in World War Two, and an early depiction of women's rights.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and his team of experts visit the London to Brighton Veteran Car Run, where they invite members of the public to bring along their prized possessions for expert examination.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team visit the RHS gardens at Wisley. Amongst the pieces under scrutiny are an early fortune teller's caravan and a credenze with a potential value of £100,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel takes the team of experts to the Royal Horticultural Society gardens at Wisley. The treasures coming to light are a set of letters written by Lewis Carroll and a valuable carriage clock saved from a skip.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team head for the village of Portmeirion in North Wales. Amongst the treasures brought to light are intricate 18th Century mosaics, items made by prisoners of war as gifts of thanks to local people, and a penknife valued at £1,500.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head for Haltwhistle in Northumberland. Among the discoveries made are original fittings from the Titanic's sister ship, the Olympic, a Roman coin from Hadrians Wall, and a letter from JRR Tolkein.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Hastings, the team assesses a Meissen pot valued at £10,000, a sketch by artist Augustus John valued at between £10-15,000 and an unopened wedding gift from the 1920s. They also meet a man with a serious addiction to Punch and Judy.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits Witley Court in Worcestershire, where they discover the complete cast of an early puppet theater, a Worcester plate valued at £4,000, a drawing by LS Lowry, and a piece of Staffordshire slipware, similar to the famous 'Ozzie the Owl.'

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head for the Magna Center in Rotherham, where they assess a rare clock given by Queen Victoria, a stash of silver valued at over £5000, some Beatles memorabilia, and one of the largest pieces ever to be brought in to a Roadshow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From the National Archives at Kew, Michael explores priceless documents from the Domesday Book and the SOS telegram sent from the Titanic. The team examines a mahogany coffer given by King James I and early papers charting the suffragettes' work.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael and the team head for Hampton Court Palace to assess a bronze figure by Auguste Rodin and an early longcase clock, but the day's absolute find is an early sketch by the abstract artist Piet Mondrian valued at between £50-70,000.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran esqueletos en el patio trasero de una casa de Virginia, la UAC enfoca su investigación en la familia que vive allí, desenterrando secretos familiares arraigados en las pasadas divisiones raciales en el Sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Apagón
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra literalmente a oscuras cuando la investigación sobre la muerte de un teniente se relaciona con un apagón en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Juego de niños
programme.desc: El trabajo diurno de un marine muerto en un laboratorio de ideas del gobierno lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a la vida de un niño prodigio de 12 años que puede ser el próximo objetivo del asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fe
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo alistado de un coronel retirado convertido en predicador aparece muerto, el equipo cree que puede ser víctima de un crimen de odio. Mientras tanto, el padre de Gibbs viene de visita por vacaciones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es asesinada en su apartamento, Danny y Báez recurren a su hija, Margo, para pedir ayuda, pero en cambio ella complica la investigación.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El amigo de Frank, Lenny, le revela que un próximo artículo revelador expondrá algo de la ropa sucia del NYPD. Erin debe decidir cómo cargar a un médico cuyos tratamientos experimentales llevaron a la muerte de su hija.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de un incidente en el que los refuerzos del oficial Witten no pudieron mantenerse físicamente a la par de una persecución, Frank debe decidir si implementar una prueba de aptitud más rigurosa para el NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que alguien irrumpa en la casa de Luis Delgado y mate a su esposa, Luis y Danny se unen para atrapar al malvado asesino, quien también puede ser responsable de la muerte de Linda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los adolescentes que fueron reportados como desaparecidos son sospechosos de una serie de asesinatos en masa en Chicago, el UAC investiga su paradero para encontrar el motivo de los crímenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran esqueletos en el patio trasero de una casa de Virginia, la UAC enfoca su investigación en la familia que vive allí, desenterrando secretos familiares arraigados en las pasadas divisiones raciales en el Sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 4/28/2019. Kamau visits Dallas, TX - the home of the Megachurch, to find out what is creating the new face of Christianity today, in a city where church and state are far from separate.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/5/2019. While in and around Seattle, Kamau takes a look at different forms of activism that white people are using to combat America’s history of white supremacy and the rise of extreme right wing groups across the country.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/12/2019. Kamau meets members of the Hmong community brought here after the Secret War forced their expulsion from Laos and learns the multi generational stories of loss, perseverance and hope that make up their American journey.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/19/2019. Kamau visits Jackson, MS to explore the divisive world of reproductive rights and reproductive justice including abortion, sex education, and women’s health.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/26/2019. Kamau takes a look at Washington D.C. through the eyes of the city’s residents who show him the vibrant culture of D.C. that is distinct from the Washington politics that surround it.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/1/2017. Lisa Ling goes on a journey through the scintillating worlds of Tantra and surrogate partner therapy in search of sexual healing.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/8/2017. Lisa explores the massive and economically diverse movement of immigration from China to the United States – and traces her own family roots, to find out what it means to be Chinese in America.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/15/2017. In this episode, Lisa explores the legal and social consequences of convicting adolescents and young adults of sex offenses – when does teenage sexuality cross the line and become a crime?

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/22/2017. As the divide between right and left reaches new heights, one group is taking an extreme approach to politics: The Patriot Movement. Lisa embeds with a militia deep in the Arizona desert preparing for threats foreign and domestic and...

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/29/2017. Contrary to what many might think, Islam is far from new to America. Lisa meets 3 very different African American Muslims and learns about the power of Islam to reshape lives in the black community, a community that can trace its co...

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.desc: La temporada alta ha terminado y con ella los ingresos extras de los campistas. Para poder llegar a fin de mes, todos necesitan una nueva fuente de ingresos.

programme.title: Con el culo al aire
programme.desc: Chus, la hermana de Lola, llega al camping y le dice que va a quedarse para cuidarla. Lola está horrorizada: sabe que no ha venido para eso, sino para vengarse de ella por acostarse con su marido.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria y Kevin son forzados a trabajar como compañeros de laboratorio de la clase de ciencias. Su tarea consiste en enseñar trucos a un ratón. Daria hace todo el trabajo, mientras Kevin mira fútbol americano y coquetea con Quinn.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: El excesivo estrés en la vida de Jake lo termina afectando en niveles críticos, por lo que la familia Morgendorffer se toma unos días de vacaciones en el bosque que finalmente no resultarán de mucha ayuda.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria y Quinn asisten como damas de honor al matrimonio de su prima Erin. Helen se reencuentra en la boda con sus dos hermanas Rita y Amy, las cuales no parecen guardar buenos recuerdos.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria encuentra a Brittany en un recital de la banda de Trent, luego de que le salieran erupciones en la piel y se enterara de que estaba engañando a Kevin. Acuerdan mantener ambos secretos.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos van de excursión al planetario y un empleado les lava el cerebro con efectos visuales para que quieran volver allí. Mientras, Cartman solo se preocupa por ganar un casting para salir en el nuevo comercial de “Quesitos Poofs”.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Todo South Park festeja el "Día de las vacas", que incluyen una feria, un monumento y la corrida de las vacas. Mientras tanto, los chicos hacen lo que sea para ganar unos muñecos de Terrance y Philip.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La ''tía Regla'' de Stan le regala un pez dorado que le da mucho miedo y comienzan a haber asesinatos que la mamá de Stan trata de encubrir. Mientras tanto, Cartman se comporta muy extraño de repente y tiene barba.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Regina says Fernando fathered her son! Fernando's mother disagrees. His father and aunt believe Regina. Fernando can't sound off because he was killed. Krystal and Ben can't agree on their relationship status and who fathered Krystal's daughter!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Slept With 4 Men…Who's The Father?
programme.desc: Ebony swears that Andre fathered her special needs daughter, but he denies it! Then, Jodi completely denies that he’s the father of Ashawnda’s baby! What will the DNA test results say?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: These dads are here to prove that they’re not the father. But these moms are not about to let them get away without taking responsibility for the child they helped bring into this world!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Two years ago Chelsea admitted that she was secretly cheating on her boyfriend Corey with his friend, but he forgave her. Does she need to know who fathered her baby? Then, Liz and Bailey have bonded over Josh fathering their kids!

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women … 4 Babies … Is He the Father?
programme.desc: We have more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Raymisha and Tianca both have children by a guy named Robert. But Robert is denying that he is the father! These women want him to step up to the plate! Later, Ashley made one mistake and now she fears that her family will be torn apart forever!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Larry denies Emaginae's baby because he's a momma's boy. Momma Lisa says her son is not the father! Dwayne wants to find out if he fathered Emily's baby and if Randy is his biological father. Then, Tim is paranoid that his wife Ariell is cheating!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Amanda’s fiancé sleep with her cousin? He denies it, but will he change his tune? Is Jimmy cheating on his fiancé Elizabeth? After 17 years of marriage, is Tim cheating on Cathy with her sister?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: You are the father! You are not the father! No one does paternity like MAURY and today's stories will not disappoint!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?
programme.desc: Nikki won’t marry Will until he proves he’s faithful, but what did our hidden cameras confirm? Then, teens Jessica and Sean are days away from marriage. Could Sean be cheating with her best friend?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Dashawn and his mom claim that it was only a one-time fling with Monica and he can’t be the father of her child! Then, party girl April wants to find out who fathered her baby! Later, is Frederick or Jason the father of Marietta’s baby?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: MAURY’s guests have been keeping devastating secrets from their loved ones and it is tearing them up inside. They are ready to come clean, even if it means losing their relationships! Will their loved ones stay or go?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Tyrell wants to clear his name that he has not been sleeping with his brother's girlfriend. Plus, Archie proved to his girlfriend Crystal that he didn't cheat on her, but they're back because she has a secret to reveal!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Terrazina’s own brother Tyson thinks that Simon is not the father. Will Tyson prove she cheated and that Simon is not the father of her daughter? Then, William is in a heated debate with two women over the paternity of their children!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Will DNA Prove Andre Is My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Chrissie is desperate to prove to her husband Rick that he’s the real father of her child. Plus, a teen mom wants to prove that Andre is her child’s father, but are the results in her favor?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These women, once and for all, want to prove to their men they ARE the father of their baby and they need to be responsible for their child. Plus, did man really father a child with his neighbor behind his partner's back?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Ashley found her own cousin's panties in her boyfriend Jeff's gym bag and photos of them in the club. Is he cheating on her? Then, will Brandy's cheating evidence prove her hunches right? Later, Patricia's best friend has a shocking secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested … Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Teshinya suspects that Clarence is picking up women at church and went undercover to get proof! Desirae is 17 and 5 months pregnant, but thinks her boyfriend Chris is cheating with her friend!

programme.title: Magic Knight Rayearth

programme.title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun

programme.title: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun

programme.title: Warlords of Sigrdrifa
programme.desc: At Denali Alaska, many Nighthawk and other types of airplanes fight off an enormous skeletal centipede-like creature.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, Eileen y Derrick Severs desaparecen de su casa en un pequeño pueblo de Gran Bretaña y la policía encuentra evidencia de un crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, una agencia federal dictaminó que Terri Strickland había provocado intencionalmente el fuego que mató a su hijo de 17 meses, Josh Hinson.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos sospechosos están vinculados a un asesinato por unas botas manchadas de sangre y una pistola, pero el dueño de los artículos dice que nunca conoció a la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo de Gran Bretaña, un granjero se encuentra con una apariencia escalofriante. Empalado en el poste de la cerca hay una cabeza de cordero cortada y una nota que dice: Usted es el próximo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un profesor de gimnasia de secundaria abandona misteriosamente la ciudad sin despedirse de nadie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Encontrar al sospechoso
programme.desc: Los atentados con bombas son difíciles de resolver, porque el perpetrador no suele estar en la escena y la evidencia se esfuma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, el cuerpo de la joven madre, Summer Baldwin, fue encontrado en una maleta en un vertedero de Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats: Episode 5
programme.desc: Summer has arrived in the Kalahari. It has been three weeks since the last rains and the desert is flourishing. A large group of giraffe have moved into the area which has been unsettling for the gang.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In this episode of Aging in the Wild, we explore the physiological secrets and factors that determine life expectancy in various animal species.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Hunting has been a long-standing cultural tradition in the North Eastern India for long. But with the shirking of the forests and endangering of the wildlife, hunting has become unsustainable.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: It’s back to the future as Te Radar visits Houston, Texas – the birthplace of American oil - to see how the DeLorean made famous by Michael J Fox has been rescued from the scrap heap and is now leading the way in cool electric transport.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks bordering on South Africa and extending into neighbouring countries. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect.

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2016 Central Italy Earthquake; this annihilating earthquake hit Central Italy in August 2016. 2017 South Asia Floods; heavy monsoon rains caused the worst floods in South Asia's history.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Episode 1

programme.title: Zambezi Crescent
programme.desc: Bruce is still working on the meat from the cow's head meat, making biltong from pieces and hanging it up, and the rest gets put into the stew.

programme.title: The Forgotten Forests Of Malaysia
programme.desc: Malaysia boasts some of the most ancient forests on the planet. These are biological treasure troves; home to an unparalleled wealth of life.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, we catch up with cub Coll after he was rushed to the vet last week. Whenever cheetah outreach is asked for a public appearance, Joe is the natural choice, but even super stars have off days.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Europe

programme.title: Wildest Indochina
programme.desc: Cambodia is one of the most bio diverse countries in southeast Asia, whose wildlife and climate is ruled by the monsoon cycle. It is a wild land of extreme rains, raging rivers and flooding lakes that create great challenges for its animals.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This city spends most of the year encased in ice…but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, working faster to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: On The Trails Of The Glaciers
programme.desc: Mission to Alaska

programme.title: Asia - Secret Lives, Hidden Places
programme.desc: On the top of a smoking volcano, on the southern island of Kyushu in Japan, a Shinto priest performs rights that keep his community safe. 200 years ago his town was completely destroyed. The last eruption here was in 1991.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina continues her stay at the Hide Safari Camp with Sean. Cecil's pride is still in the area scouting for prey. Sean teaches Kristina about elephant anatomy and wild dogs take down an impala and mate right outside camp.

programme.title: Antarctica
programme.desc: For the first time in history the mysterious icy expanse of the highest, driest and coldest continent has been captured in the giant screen format. Experience the life and drama of Antarctica like never before.

programme.title: The Last Reef
programme.desc: The Last Reef is an uplifting, inspirational experience capturing one of nature's more vibrant and diverse wonderlands. These biodiversity hot spots are as vital to our lives as the rainforests.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a new case is someone Brooke was unable to convict previously.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage's troubles start trending; Dondre discovers that Janelle has been keeping a secret from him.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Odalie finds out why Davis has been skipping class; King's loyalties are torn; Tal finally makes a move on his crush.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tensions flare at Dondre and Janelle's over-the-top party; Johnny forces Tal to face the truth about who he is.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Poppy and Janelle open up to one another; Rigo and Dondre grapple with the events of the party.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Rigo goes viral; King makes a big reveal to Poppy.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage Odom's tour auditions get underway; Uncle Al tries to save the twins; Collette and East-O's turbulent past comes to a head.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop struggles to maintain his place within the family after another Zora crisis hits the Greenleafs; Grace attempts to convince Coralie not to take the district attorney's plea deal.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop wrestles with signing the divorce papers on the weekend of his Silver Jubilee celebration; Grace realizes her father will need help at Calvary when Lady Mae is gone.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace discovers Rochelle Cross' true identity with Darius' help. Kerissa welcomes Triumph's new accountant and learns two hundred thousand dollars is missing.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Greenleafs' IRS issues escalate when the FBI raids both Calvary and Triumph on suspicion of embezzlement; Grace questions her paternity when Aaron tells her that his father, Lionel, died.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Mae preaches beautifully at A Day With Lady Mae as the Bishop fears he may lose Calvary; Grace gets a paternity test with Aaron and works with Jacob to clear their family name.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: After the success of her big day, Lady Mae is denied the right to run Calvary despite support from the Bishop; Grace takes over thanks to Connie and joins Harmony & Hope Ministries.

programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising

programme.desc: Determined to give the Insomniac's a night of good dreams, Izzie and friends bring them to the Candy Realm; but nowhere is safe from Nightmare King.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers arrive at Castle Nocturnia hoping to find the key to defeating the Nightmare King, but the castle won't reveal its secrets easily.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The barrier to the Waking World has been torn and the Nightmare King invades Brooklyn, where the Dream Chasers must make their final stand!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking in the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible ... but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny dons powerful dino-mech armor to dig up Cap'n No-Beard's treasure beneath Mt. Sibo, making him more than a match for our heroes ... and a mighty allosaurus that unexpectedly joins the party!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all ... in the form of the T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen scrambles to shut down O.O.P.S.I. before it can do real damage, while Claire and the others hunt the escaped twin dinosaurs ... only to become hunted themselves!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: O.O.P.S.I., the new artificial intelligence running the Park, goes dangerously off the rails, while a thief posing as an intern steals two eggs that contain a new species of dinosaur inside!

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous "Cubby the Cop" balloon on the city. Fire Chief McCloud accidentally buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich and Sinclair compete to win the City's tallest building contest. An off-screen narrator narrates a day in the life of a helpful handyman, Harl Hubbs.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's "Hands Off Day!" a city holiday, where the entire city doesn't use their hands for anything. A nature documentary crew follows Billionaire Fendrich as if he was an animal in the wild.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Teenage superstar, Poppy Starr, visits her grandfather, Sargent Sam Grizzled. Billy and Madison lose a flying disc inside a creepy-looking house.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: The Mayor and Carol work late when all manner of strange events begin to happen. Extreme Sports host, Dynamo, holds a competition to see who will go on the City Mars mission.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Firefighter Buster Lloyd gets the opportunity to live out his fantasy of being a police officer. Sanitation worker, Shirley Keeper, educates local residents on how to take care of their City.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars/launch fever! Astronauts reach Mars orbit and prepare to launch their probes, but Tippy Doorman has other plans.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled "Mars Door" back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mastermind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bege arrives on the scene, seemingly willing to risk it all to bring down the Big Mom Pirates in a blaze of glory, but of course he has a trick up his sleeve! Meanwhile, Luffy keeps on the move to regain his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Bege get together and get off of Cacao Island successfully, but their plan is in jeopardy as Oven begins to boil the sea itself! As Chiffon and the others who are on the ship are cornered, a surprising savior comes in to fight Oven!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A vicious pincer attack bears down on the Straw Hats! Three fleets converge and try to squeeze the life from them! Daifuku himself take the lead! But Carrot draws on a deep power within and springs in to action under the light of the moon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The much anticipated wedding cake is on its way, but there is a debate at the last minute! Shouldn't this opportunity be used to slip poison into Big Mom's meal to topple the Emperor of the Sea?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, through sheer force of will, can almost use his Haki to battle Katakuri! Meanwhile, the Sunny catches fire while the Straw Hats try to kick out Big Mom, but that's when Jimbei steps up to the plate and takes a swing at her!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries to enhance his Haki to foresee Katakuri's next move, but Katakuri's attacks keep pulling him down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The cake is finally prepared and brought before Big Mom! With the end of her vicious rampage in sight, there is a chance for the Straw Hats to flee! Big Mom's crew is forced to decide who to attack! Meanwhile, Luffy grows ever closer to using his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hiding her presence, Flampe shoots her blowgun at Luffy to support her dear brother Katakuri. Meanwhile, Oven launches a dastardly plan to fence Luffy in - by destroying every mirror on the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Katakuri notices his sister Flampe is sneakily providing poison needle back up in the shadows. Becoming enraged, he takes unexpected action that surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Smoothie increases her size and closes in on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leans on his training to bring out the power of his Haki! Meanwhile, the children of Big Mom gather as a massive force, ready to smash Luffy and the Straw Hats. Their resentment at being embarrassed fuels their desire to get revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Katakuri are locked in a duel to end all duels! Their powers ensure that each blow could be the last! Luffy must rely on his training, let all his thoughts out, and keep pushing on! Meanwhile, Sanji is about to land at Cacao Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's dramatic battle finally draws to a close! But even if he is able to pull out victory in the last moment, can he remember the key to escaping the Mirrorworld?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges safely! And Pekoms' bravery ensures he and the Straw Hats have a fighting chance! But can they withstand the full force of the Big Mom Pirates? At the last moment - a surprise explodes onto the scene!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji tries his best to save himself and his captain, Luffy! But the arrival of Germa has complicated matters. Whose side do these powerful superhumans fight on? In the end, sisterly love will see Sanji saved!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Sanji are safe! But the critical moment approaches - the fate of Totto Land rests on the taste of the wedding cake! Will it be sweet release or bitter defeat? Meanwhile, a cunning pincer attack leaves the Straw Hats hopelessly trapped.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the help of the Sun Pirates, the Straw Hats see their chance to escape! And the Sun Pirates bid farewell to their former captain. Mama finally tastes the Wedding Cake and the results are positively scrumptious!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At a great cost of energy and life, the Straw Hats make it out of Totto Land. Left behind in their wake are allies and friends, and would-be lovers. As the sea opens before them, what price has been paid for their escape?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's recent exploits make their way around the world! The reputation of this mighty pirate begins to grow as all eyes look towards the Straw Hats' next move! Also - German 66 leaves an artifact behind which excites the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the royals make their way to the Reverie, the mighty Navy takes all precautions to make sure they don't fall prey to kidnappings! At the vanguard is Koby, who glimpses Luffy's exploits and remembers their shared past.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Rage-filled teenager James is never one to back down from a fight. He jumps at the chance to run drugs and guns for a gang and quickly ends up behind bars.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: In this crime-drama starring football superstar Jim Brown, a notorious gangster must reconcile his past in order to make a future for his criminally-minded son.

programme.title: Cube
programme.desc: Seven complete strangers of widely varying personality characteristics are involuntarily placed in an endless maze containing deadly traps.

programme.title: Jacob's Ladder (1990)

programme.title: Jennifer Eight

programme.title: Bad Ass
programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran who becomes a local hero after saving a man from attackers on a city bus decides to take action when his best friend is murdered and the police show little interest in solving the crime.

programme.desc: Truman doesn’t realize that his quaint hometown is a giant studio set run by a visionary producer/director/creator (Ed Harris), that folks living and working there are Hollywood actors, that even his incessantly bubbly wife is a contract player.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: While still reeling from her fight with Stephan's mom, Kayla makes a big life decision for Iziah. A sad anniversary for Kiaya brings up some old feelings. And introducing Kayla J! She struggles to co-parent with her best friend.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla wants Luke to choose between his family & going back to Iowa to play basketball. Meanwhile Kayla J and Makel quickly realize that coparenting their daughter will be harder than expected now that Kayla has issues with Makel bringing new women around.
